title: A Shaking World — Closing Beat
description: The news of Dressrosa spreads as the balance of power begins to shift.
scene: On pages 13–15, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Marines, Straw Hat Pirates, Luffy deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: We Marines were completely powerless! We couldn't do a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If the Straw Hats hadn't been there,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ALABASTA WOULD HAVE SURELY BECOME LIKE DRESSROSA. A PIRATE'S HAVEN!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: But the world government reported everything as the handiwork of the Marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If only... If only I'd had more status and power at that time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He actually bloody did it, that Fijitora...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Reminds me of our frustration and regret two years ago on Alabama.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's almost as if he's gone and gotten our revenge for us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even if I had the same status as he does I'd never be able to pull something like this off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My heart... feels lighter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, I know just the thing! How about some coffee and muffins!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My heart, woman, not my stomach!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What-?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ONEE- CHAN! WE'RE STARVING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oh my! Well, we've got some muffins! Shall I go round up some coffee as well?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You'd be crazy to let us drink coffee!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: By the way, how much longer until pants?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: But I'm so down with the muffins though!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Vegapunk, dear. We've still got a few more days until...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: We reach Dr. vegapunk's laboratory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Ain't that a scene~ Our Lieutenant- Chan is so good with kids

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I wanna become a kid again!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: You lot! Instead of Dilly- Dallying, how about helping to pick up all the slack around here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Anything you say, Miss

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: There are a thousand different ways we could have covered that up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Sorry, I just have no intention of letting a bunch of lies turn me into a hero.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Wasn't it our own boss, the illustrious world government, that hired these pirates in the first place, in order to maintain "balance"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: the credibility and dignity of marine HQ itself is what's on the line here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: ISSHOU- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Please, remember who you're talking to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Because of your bloody antics the very face of justice itself has been dragged through the mud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: If it dirties that easily, why don't you just keep that face hidden in your damn nightie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: If our credibility has been so compromised by the admission of a single mistake, it never existed in the first place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Eeeee! Eek!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: This... this mess is on you to clean up, Fufitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Until you bring me the heads of both Straw Hat and law, I will see to it that the doors of every single marine base on this earth remain closed to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: FINE BY ME ...THAT'S EXACTLY HOW I WANT IT!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
